subject: Cumulative and Survival Distribution Functions
question: Consider a random variable $X$ whose probability mass function is given by $\Pr(x) = \begin{cases} p & x = -1.9 \\ 0.1 & x = -0.1 \\ 0.3 & x = 2 \\ 0p & x = 3 \\ 4p & x = 4 \\ 0 & \text{otherwise} \end{cases}$ (a) What is $p$? (b) Find $F(x)$ and sketch its graph. (c) What is $F(0)$? What is $F(2)$? What is $F(F(3.1))$? (d) What is $\Pr(2X-3\le 4 \mid X\ge 2.0)$? (e) Compute $E(F(X))$.
